description.value: Price 25,000 gp; Slot belt; CL 8th; Weight 1 lb.; Aura moderate transmutation DESCRIPTION This wide belt grants the wearer a +4 enhancement bonus to Strength. In addition, the wearer can spend 1 ki point to use stone shape. When he uses this ability, he can instead choose to shape metal, but he can affect only one-tenth as much material. To shape a usable weapon out of metal or stone, the wearer must succeed at a Craft (weapons) check. Items created in this way can never be of masterwork quality. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 12,500 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells bear’s endurance, stone shape
